airbus defence and space, spain. system and software design and development of a new flybywire flight control system (fcs), consisting of primary flight actuator control electronic (pface), flight control computer (fcc) and humanmachine interface (hmi) display, controlling critical aerodynamics surfaces (i.e. elevators and rudder). it is a model-driven engineering, long-term, r&d technological project for future commercial products based on airbus military's c-295 aircraft. o design of dissimilar hardware and software architectures for the whole system. model and develop the pface software aerial refuelling boom system (arbs). o responsible for the integration of a new timing verification process for the bccs software, performing worst-case execution time (wcet) analysis based on a carlos ill university av universidad 30 28911 leganes spain dear sir, am an experienced flight software and validation engineer, specialised in real-time and embedded aerospace systems, with a proven ability in engineering, validation and verification activities for safety critical airborne software, and a consolidated expertise in worst-case execution time analysis of hard real-time systems. would be very interested in participating in the master in aircraft systems integration as a wonderful means to complete my knowledge in aerospace systems engineering. have a m. sc. degree in computer science engineering from technical university of madrid (upm), which gives me a solid academic background especially gained during the two years internship at the real-time systems research group of the mentioned university, led by prof. juan a. de la puente. this time gave me the passion for research, development and innovation as the best way to be an engineer. am also experienced in working abroad. during my participation in esas educational programme prestige, had the opportunity of joining estec's software systems engineering section headed by jean-loup terraillon as a trainee acting in an international environment, developing my work in interdisciplinary groups and together with people of different countries, which gave me a good perspective of what the space industry is. it encouraged me to be a part of this fascinating world by means of my hard work and professionalism. after this interesting experience, have been working for important spanish aerospace companies like gmv and airbus defence and space (former airbus military - eads). currently, since january 2011, have served as an on-board software engineer for the later one, within the control systems software department (air to air refuelling systems directorate) under the supervision of mr ismael lafoz. my main responsibilities in this period have been mainly focused on leading several developments and integrations within the software development life cycle of the critical control system in the airbus a330 mrtt aircraft (i.e. a timing verification system, low level testing campaign and structural coverage analysis, etc). have acted, additionally, as the focal point for the relationship with several tools providers. currently am responsible for the whole development process of the pface software for one of its two redundant and dissimilar channels. participate and lead the full lifecycle development, coordinating some critical verification activities, i.e. high and low level requirements verification, 4/5 data and control coupling analyses, structural coverage analysis, etc. all of them performed in accordance with do-178c objectives. also elaborate the required technical documentation for the strictest certification processes. from the point of view of the personal strengths, am a very easygoing person. like very much meeting new people and feel confortable expressing my ideas and opinions in such situations so consider that my communication skills are good. in my work always try to be very proactive and resolute, self-motivated and goal-oriented. am always keen to learn fast and improve. changes or highly demanding challenges do not scare me. do try to keep an open-minded attitude when approaching the problems, with good analysing and organizational skills. great team work player, committed with the project and used to work under pressure offering the best. sometimes, an excess of perfectionism could make my work apparently slower. the main reason is that do not like shortcuts cause think they always result in further loss of time. prefer take some time thinking the best and more robust solution from the beginning rather than trial-and-error approaches. in some situations could also result a bit stubborn, but am always able to recognize the best ideas and options when they come from others with flexibility. all what have presented above, my proffesional career, my skills and my interests might suit well with a position in the master in aircraft systems integration. totally understand the importance of this opportunity in my career and am pretty sure that my profile could be interesting, taking my experience into consideration. let me finally thank you for taking the time to review my credentials. hope you feel a personal meeting would be beneficial am available at your convenience. if you have any questions or when you are ready to schedule an interview, please let me know. sincerely yours, esteban asensio attached:
